facts: IIT Patna (Indian Institute of Technology Patna) is located at Bihta, Patna, Bihar 801106.
Languages spoken: Bhojpuri, Hindi, and English (English mostly on campus only).
Climate: Summer 35-45C with heatwaves. Monsoon has moderate to heavy rain. Winter 5-15C with fog. Spring and Autumn are pleasant. Weather described as pretty weird and confusing.
Airport is accessible via cabs, autos, and buses.
Bihta is the nearest railway station to IIT Patna.
Danapur and Patna Junction are also nearby railway stations.
Patna Bus Stand and Pataliputra Bus Stand serve IIT Patna.
Ola and Uber are available.
IIT Patna has 3 boys hostels.
CV Raman Hostel is for 1st year boys with 3 per room.
Aryabhatta Hostel A+B is for 2nd year boys with 2 per room.
Kalam Hostel C+D is for 3rd and 4th year boys with 2 per room.
1st year boys are allotted 3-sharing rooms in CV Raman. Senior boys get 2-sharing rooms.
IIT Patna has 2 girls hostels.
Aryabhatta Hostel is for 1st year girls.
Asima Hostel is for 2nd year and 3rd/4th year girls.

mess.assignment: Each hostel has its own separate mess. All 1st year students eat in the CV Raman mess (combined).

facts: WiFi is available in all hostels.
LAN is available in CV Raman and Aryabhatta hostels.
Kalam hostel has WiFi only (no LAN).
5G network is available.
Poor mobile network in academic departments but WiFi is available there.
75% attendance is mandatory per semester per course at IIT Patna.
Below 75% means not eligible for exam and must do a summer term.
Valid medical reasons are accepted as exceptions.
Celesta (tech fest).
Anwesha (cultural fest).
Infinito (sports fest).
TEDx is organized at IIT Patna.
Each hostel block has separate laundry facilities. Laundry is paid from this year.
External laundry service Cleanologist is available outside the hostel.
Elections are held for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd year students.
Positions: Sports Secretary, HoSCA (Head of Student Cultural Affairs), SWB (Student Welfare Board), AIR (Alumni and Industrial Relations, new for 3rd to 4th year), Hostel Affairs Secretary.
Vice President position is only for students going to 4th year and requires having held a position before.
Cricket, Volleyball, Badminton, Basketball, Table Tennis, Lawn Tennis, Football, Hockey, Chess, and Carrom Board are available.
Food Court on campus with 2 food shops and 1 grocery/snacks shop.
Additional shops are available outside Gate 1.
Institute hospital with ambulance facility, located far from hostels.
NSMCH (Medical College Hospital) is outside campus. Students show ID card, pay first, then get reimbursed via a form.
Bhojpuri, Hindi, and English are spoken around IIT Patna. English is mostly used on campus only.
Summer: 35-45C with heatwaves. Monsoon: moderate to heavy rain. Winter: 5-15C with fog. Spring/Autumn: pleasant. Weather is described as pretty weird and confusing.
